meta.title: Eli Movers – Fixed Price, No Surprises
meta.description: Eli Movers – Professional moving service in Jerusalem, Tel Aviv, Modi'in and central Israel. Fixed price, full transparency, no hidden fees.

hero.title:
Professional Moving
No Surprises
hero.sub: A fixed price agreed upfront. Full transparency before your move. We stay until you're completely satisfied.

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: Comprehensive moving solutions for every need – from full apartment moves to packing and furniture assembly
services.apt_desc: Professional moving for apartments of any size, with careful handling of every item.
services.office_desc: Efficient and fast office moves with minimal disruption to your operations.
services.small_desc: A quick, affordable solution for moving a small number of items or a single piece of furniture.
services.pack_desc: Professional, meticulous packing with high-quality protective materials for all your belongings.
services.unpack_desc: We don't leave until everything is in order – unwrapping, sorting, and arranging on the spot.
services.furniture_desc: Professional disassembly and reassembly of all types of furniture before and after the move.

calc.eyebrow: How much will my move cost?
calc.title: Moving Cost Estimator
calc.desc: Enter your move details and get an instant price estimate
calc.total_note: Estimate only – contact us for an exact quote
calc.cta: Get an Exact Quote on WhatsApp

why.title:
Full Transparency,
No Surprises
why.desc: Before every move, we explain exactly what will happen, how it will be carried out, and what it will cost. No unexpected charges will ever appear.
why.item1_desc: The agreed price is the final price – no add-ons, no surprises.
why.item2_desc: We take full responsibility for every item from pickup to placement.
why.item3_title: We Don't Leave Until You're Satisfied
why.item3_desc: Furniture placed exactly where you want, boxes organized, all wrapping removed.
why.item4_desc: In many cases no advance booking is needed – reach out and we'll work something out.
why.checklist_1: Removal of all protective wrapping and materials
why.checklist_2: Sorting and organizing boxes by room
why.checklist_3: Placing furniture exactly where you want it
why.checklist_4: Ensuring everything is tidy before we leave

diff.eyebrow: The Difference That Makes All the Difference
diff.title: Others vs. Eli Movers
diff.desc: Most moving companies leave immediately after unloading. We work differently.
diff.bad_2: Packing materials left on the floor
diff.bad_3: Furniture not in the right place
diff.bad_5: All the organizing is left to you
diff.good_3: Furniture placed exactly where you want
diff.good_5: We leave only with your approval

areas.title: Our Service Areas
areas.desc: Jerusalem, Tel Aviv, Petah Tikva, Ramat Gan, Holon, Rishon LeZion, Givatayim, Bnei Brak, Modi'in, Netanya, Shoham & more

insurance.title: Full Insurance for All Moved Items
insurance.desc: We provide comprehensive insurance coverage for all items in transit. If you used our packing service, coverage extends to packed items as well – including appliances such as refrigerators, washing machines, and all household equipment.

offer.title: Special Discount for IDF Soldiers & Reservists
offer.desc: We recognize your contribution to Israel's security. 10% discount for all IDF soldiers and reservists.

contact.title: Get a Free Quote
contact.desc: A no-cost quote and fast response – on WhatsApp or by phone
contact.quote_desc: You can get a free quote on WhatsApp. In many cases, no advance booking is required – reach out and we'll see what we can arrange.
contact.owner_quote: "I'm committed to giving you straightforward, professional service at a fair price. There will be no surprises – what we agreed on is what you'll pay."
contact.owner_sig: — Eli, 7 Years in the Moving Industry

footer.footer_sub: Professional service, fixed price, no surprises
